items.title: Rendement Van Persie (bijna) net zo goed als dat van Slot in eerste Feyenoord-jaar
items.summary: Na een jaar Robin van Persie als hoofdtrainer van Feyenoord kan een tussenbalans worden opgemaakt. De van SC Heerenveen overgekomen trainer doet het qua puntengemiddelde in de Eredivisie precies even goed als Arne Slot.

items.title: Chiefs 'prepared' for retirement with Kelce scheduled to become a free agent
items.summary: Kansas City Chiefs have said they are "prepared for either scenario" with Travis Kelce set to become a free agent next month, although the general manager has revealed they have had "positive" discussions with the 36-year-old.

items.title: VI Live: PSG en Real willen klusje klaren, Atalanta en Juve hopen op comeback
items.summary: Woensdagavond vinden de laatste returns in de tussenronde van de Champions League plaats. Real Madrid en Paris Saint-Germain hopen het klusje te klaren. Atalanta en Juventus hebben een comeback nodig. Volg de duels in deze VI Live.

items.title: Bodø/Glimt is coming: vergeet de kouclichés en Noordpoolreferenties
items.summary: Vierenhalf jaar geleden won Bodø/Glimt met 6-1 van AS Roma. Het was het moment waarop de rest van Europa ontdekte dat er ergens rond de poolcirkel wordt gevoetbald door een Noorse club. Het is een verhaal dat om meerdere redenen aanspreekt en daardoor ook al honderden keren is verteld. Vooral het poolcirkel-element spreekt kennelijk nogal tot de verbeelding. Dat zag je ook terug in alle nabeschouwingen over het 'arctische wonder'.

items.title: Bodø treedt in voetsporen van magisch Ajax met indrukwekkende reeks
items.summary: FK Bodø/Glimt staat in de achtste finale van de Champions League na een indrukwekkende prestatie. Niet alleen werd met Internazionale de finalist van vorig seizoen tweemaal verslagen in een tweeluik, de club zette een ongeslagen reeks neer tegen toptegenstanders.

items.title: Mask Of Zorro chases the five-timer at Bangor
items.summary: We have a busy day’s racing on Wednesday, with action from Bangor-on-Dee and Lingfield Park, live on Sky Sports Racing...

items.title: Hoe 'een tonnetje' een droomtransfer van Kuwas blokkeerde
items.summary: Blijf via dit blog op de hoogte van alle transfers en transfergeruchten bij en rond clubs in de Eredivisie en de Keuken Kampioen Divisie. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland .

items.title: Nelson: Benn split will 'really hurt' Hearn but it’s business
items.summary: Conor Benn’s decision to join Dana White’s Zuffa Boxing will have "really hurt" promoter Eddie Hearn but it’s a "business move", says Sky Sports expert Johnny Nelson.

items.title: Why F1's seven title hopefuls should believe they can be 2026 champion
items.summary: With no clearly dominant car emerging during Formula 1’s extended 2026 pre-season testing schedule, seven drivers will arrive at the season-opening Australian Grand Prix with genuine hopes of winning this year’s world championship.

items.title: WC host cities warn Congress of security concerns
items.summary: Local officials representing World Cup host cities warned Congress on Tuesday that security concerns, coordination problems and inadequate federal funding are risking catastrophe with little more than 100 days remaining before the games begin.

items.title: Wrexham overcome illness to cement playoff spot
items.summary: Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson revealed his side had been hit by a sickness bug in the lead-up to their hard-fought 2-1 win over Portsmouth.

items.title: Stunned Inter say Bodo/Glimt 'proved' they belong
items.summary: Inter Milan limped out of the Champions League with a disappointing 2-1 loss at home to Bodø/Glimt -- knocked out in the playoff round 5-2 on aggregate -- in what is being labeled as one of the biggest upsets in competition history.

items.title: Mexico's Aguirre: Everyone 'safe' for Iceland game
items.summary: Mexico coach Javier Aguirre said his federation promised everyone will be safe at a friendly against Iceland in Queretaro this Wednesday amid recent security concerns across the country that emerged after the killing of a powerful cartel leader.

items.title: Italian clubs on brink of historic Champions League embarrassment
items.summary: Italian clubs are on the brink of a historic Champions League embarrassment, with the prospect of none making the last 16.

items.title: West Brom sack head coach Eric Ramsay after only 44 days in charge
items.summary: Coach failed to win any of his nine games since MLS move James Morrison is put in interim charge of the strugglers West Brom have sacked their head coach Eric Ramsay after just 44 days in charge at the Hawthorns. The 34-year-old was appointed on a two-and-a-half-year deal on 11 January following the departure of Ryan Mason but has failed to win any of his nine matches in charge. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Bring it on' – Newcastle's message to Chelsea and Barcelona
items.summary: Jacob Murphy says Newcastle will relish whoever they face in the Champions League last 16 after progressing via the play-offs.

items.title: 'Historical moment' as Bodo/Glimt succeed against all odds
items.summary: Bodo/Glimt knock out last year's finalists Inter Milan in one of the biggest upsets in Champions League history and now the team from the Arctic Circle is dreaming of how far they can go after reaching last 16.

items.title: Swansea bow to co-owner Snoop Dogg with guard of honour before kick-off
items.summary: American rapper arrives to see draw against Preston Ipswich close on second after Middlesbrough drop points The Swansea City co-owner Snoop Dogg was greeted with twirling towels and a guard of honour on his first visit to the Welsh club. The American rapper, who is a minority owner of the Championship club alongside the television host Martha Stewart and Croatia international Luka Modric, made his first appearance at the Swansea.com Stadium for Tuesday’s clash with Preston. Snoop Dogg joined the Swansea ownership group last July and made his way to south-west Wales after being at the Winter Olympics, where he served as Team USA’s honorary coach as well as a special correspondent for broadcaster NBC. Continue reading...

items.title: West Brom sack Ramsay after 44 days in charge
items.summary: West Brom have sacked Eric Ramsay just 44 days after appointing him head coach.

items.title: West Brom sack head coach Ramsay after nine games
items.summary: West Bromwich Albion sack head coach Eric Ramsay after only nine games in charge at The Hawthorns.
